name: Release Notes v3.5.0 - Back Office and POS
body:

We've also made it easier to manage orders with an updated Web Alert feature and the ability to easily search for external Order reference numbers. Finally, we've made a large number of improvements and resolutions, listed below in detail for you!"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Update 6-Jun-19:", "bold": true}, {"text": " "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/Release-Notes-v3-5-5-POS-and-Back-Offic", "children": [{"text": "Version 3.5.5"}]}, {"text": " hotfix has been released with additional functionality and fixes, please see the "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/Release-Notes-v3-5-5-POS-and-Back-Offic", "children": [{"text": "Release Notes"}]}, {"text": " for more information."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "On this page:", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "#po-matrix", "children": [{"text": "New Purchase Order Matrix/Package Template"}]}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "#web-alerts", "children": [{"text": "Web Order Alerts"}]}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "#external-reference", "children": [{"text": "External Order Reference search"}]}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "#improvements", "children": [{"text": "Improvements and Resolutions"}]}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Please note there have been updates to other Retail Express products. The new layout has been designed especially for Matrix Products and Packages, and displays quantities of products based on their size and colour attributes."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "For example, if you typically place orders for the same style of product in varying size and colour, the new Email/Print Template will group these products together, with dedicated columns and rows for the sizes and colours. This makes it easier for your Supplier to understand which products you're ordering."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000ppgI3EAI.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000ppgI3EAI.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "inline", "float": "none", "name": "mceclip0 - 2023-07-09T193337.410.png"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"text": ""}, {"text": "The same product in two different sizes and two different colours grouped together on the order below"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000ppgI8EAI.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000ppgI8EAI.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "inline", "float": "none", "name": "pomatrixtemplate.png"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"text": ""}, {"type": "a", "url": "http://galaxy.maropost.com/home/leaving?allowTrusted=1&target=https%3A%2F%2Fress.zendesk.com%2Fhc%2Farticle_attachments%2F360002156036%2Fpomatrixtemplate.png", "children": [{"text": "The new PO format as seen on an email - click to enlarge"}]}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "The Term Matrix products refers to products sharing a common Manufacturer SKU (sometimes referred to as a Style Code). For example, the same shirt in different sizes/colours will have unique Supplier SKU codes and size/colour combinations, but share the same Manufacturer SKU. These products are typically displayed in a "matrix" table format."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h4", "children": [{"text": ""}], "data-id": "n-a"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "How to use the new Template:"}], "data-id": "how-to-use-the-new-template"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The new template is available when emailing or printing your order."}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Navigate to "}, {"text": "Inventory > PO Management > Create PO", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/Create-a-Purchase-Order", "children": [{"text": "Create your Purchase Order"}]}, {"text": " as normal"}, {"text": "
